backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts (create, update, delete, get, list published), comment management, and blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: changing hero section text colors to black and displaying the AyurGlow Secrets logo in navigation/footer.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, components, pages, styling with earth-tone colors, blog CRUD operations, and ReactQuill editor with image upload functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, including earth-tone palette and sidebar theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with AyurGlow Secrets title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app root with TanStack Router configuration defining all routes (home, about, categories, subcategories, blog, admin, legal) and QueryClient setup with Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Blog sidebar component with remedy search functionality, popular posts list with images, and category counts, featuring click-outside detection and keyboard navigation.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays a comment form and list of comments for a blog post, using React Query hooks for fetching and adding comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Renders a large hero-style card for a featured blog post with image, title, excerpt, category badge, and metadata (date, read time).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, navigation links organized in columns (Quick Links, Categories, Legal), social media icons, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders Navigation, children content, and Footer in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menus, category dropdown, and admin link; includes responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Compact blog post card component displaying image, title, excerpt, category badge, and metadata in a hover-animated card layout.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with icon, clear button, and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) using forwardRef.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown search results list with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape), highlighting selected items and navigating on click.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state, creating AuthClient instances, and handling identity delegation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all posts, get published posts, get single post, create, update, delete) and comment operations, using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook that provides search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering a predefined list of remedies by title, category, and keywords based on user query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic-themed color palette using OKLCH color space, defining light and dark mode variables for earth tones, greens, and typography styles with responsive design.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with hero section and content cards using Ayurvedic-themed styling and icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, create/edit/delete actions, loading states, error handling, and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid with sidebar, loading spinner, error handling, and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full content, featured/beginning images, metadata (date, read time, author), sidebar, and comment section with back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), image uploads (featured, beginning, content), metadata fields, publish toggle, and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts, pre-populating fields from fetched post data, with same rich text editor and image upload capabilities as create page.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing 4 natural treatments (neem-tea tree, lemon-yogurt, fenugreek-curd, aloe vera-coconut) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring 4 Ayurvedic remedies (curry leaves-coconut oil, amla-henna, black tea-coffee rinse, bhringraj-brahmi) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency for preventing and reversing premature greying.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting 4 hair fall treatment remedies (onion juice, fenugreek seeds, amla-shikakai, curry leaves-coconut oil) with structured cards displaying ingredients, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency for reducing hair loss.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing 4 hair growth remedies (castor-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj, egg-yogurt protein, hibiscus-curry leaves) with detailed ingredient lists, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency to stimulate healthy hair growth.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying 5 hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil treatment, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi oil) with comprehensive ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for deep conditioning and scalp health.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Category landing page for hair care products/services displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) in a grid with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React page component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative React page for diabetes and blood pressure support with similar remedies (fenugreek, bitter gourd, cinnamon tea, garlic-ginger), using Card components and including a medical disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page presenting Ayurvedic digestive remedies including Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, each with preparation instructions, benefits, and usage guidelines.
Alternative digestive health page featuring Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea, and ajwain water remedies with icons, ingredients, application steps, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component displaying immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

React page showcasing immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey shot with detailed preparation and benefits, optimized with SEO-friendly heading.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: React page component presenting stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
React page component similar to StressSleepPage, featuring calming Ayurvedic remedies for stress and sleep with a hero section, back navigation, and card-based layout for remedy details.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: React page component showcasing weight management remedies including Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP, Stress/Sleep) in a grid with hero section and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage with hero banner, 'What We Offer' section showcasing four service categories, featured post display, and recent posts grid using published posts from API.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page with hero section and expandable cards covering information collection, usage, cookies, third-party services, and user rights with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: React page component displaying acne and pimple treatments like Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with detailed application instructions and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: React component displaying acne treatment remedies with four natural treatments (Neem-Turmeric, Tea Tree-Aloe, Sandalwood-Rosewater, Cinnamon-Honey), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: React component presenting anti-aging remedies with four treatments (Almond-Saffron, Avocado-Honey, Rose Water-Glycerin, Papaya-Yogurt), displaying ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency in a structured card format.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: React component showcasing five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (Multani Mitti, Besan-Turmeric, Oatmeal-Honey, Sandalwood-Rose, Banana-Honey), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React component featuring four natural glow remedies (Turmeric-Yogurt, Saffron-Milk, Aloe Vera-Rose Water, Papaya-Honey) with detailed ingredients, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency displayed in card components.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React component with hero section and four remedies for treating pigmentation and dark spots (Lemon-Honey, Potato-Cucumber, Almond-Milk, Orange Peel-Yogurt), including back navigation link and detailed treatment information in Card components.
React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction, featuring four natural treatments with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) in a responsive grid with hero section.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of Service page with medical disclaimer alert, hero section, and multiple cards covering agreement terms, website usage, intellectual property, and liability limitations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (earth tones, greens, golds), typography settings, spacing, shadows, and animations for the AyurGlow Secrets design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking AyurGlow Secrets features, including completed color changes to hero section text and logo implementation in header/footer.
